description_long: This object is a stylized, pixelated handgun with a blocky, retro appearance reminiscent of classic video game graphics. The main body and slide are rendered in black, with a long, rectangular barrel and a squared-off profile. The grip is a contrasting orange-brown color, featuring a simple, angular design without visible texturing or embellishments. The trigger and trigger guard are integrated into the blocky form, with the guard appearing as a solid, rectangular extension beneath the barrel. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible manufacturer markings, safety switches, or detailed mechanical features. The asset's proportions and color scheme make it easily recognizable as a handgun, suitable for use in urban-themed digital environments.
description: A blocky, pixel-art style handgun with a black barrel and an orange-brown grip, featuring a minimalist, retro design. The object has a long, rectangular barrel and simple geometric shapes.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing a narrow, rectangular profile with no visible details except the width of the barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the black barrel, the orange-brown grip, and the blocky trigger guard, highlighting the pixelated, retro style.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the handgun, with the grip and slide forming a stepped, rectangular silhouette and no visible details.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the black barrel, orange-brown grip, and the angular trigger guard, emphasizing the stylized, geometric design.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is a simple, blocky, rectangular shape with a flat surface and no visible texturing, finger grooves, or ergonomic contouring. It is colored in a solid orange-brown, giving it a distinct contrast from the rest of the object. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or surface patterns, and the design is minimalist, consistent with a pixel-art style.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is a thick, rectangular extension beneath the barrel, lacking curvature or undercuts. It is solid and blocky, matching the overall geometric style, with no visible reinforcement, texturing, or integrated accessories. The design is utilitarian and unembellished.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long, rectangular, and unadorned, with a flat profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensators. There are no external features such as suppressor threads or markings, and the finish is a uniform black consistent with the rest of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unmarked, with no logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, flush with the bottom of the grip. It lacks any visible finger rests, flaring, beveling, logos, or texturing, maintaining the minimalist, pixelated aesthetic.
